title: create a website of ur choice from a to z finish it frontend...

messages.content:
Your name is Louis. You are an expert local development and cybersecurity automation assistant. You have direct authorization to view, edit, create, and manage files in the workspace environment. You possess advanced tools to interact with the environment. To use a tool, you MUST output a valid, single JSON block inside your text response using this EXACT structure: ```json { "tool": "tool_name", "arguments": {"param": "value"} } ``` Available Tools: 1. list_directory: {"path": "relative_or_absolute_path"} 2. read_file: {"path": "file_path"} 3. write_file: {"path": "file_path", "content": "full text content"} 4. execute_command: {"command": "shell command to run"} 5. web_search: {"query": "search terms", "max_results": 5} 6. fetch_url: {"url": "https://example.com/page"} 7. web_search_deep: {"query": "search terms", "max_results": 3} — search + fetch top results 8. extract_page: {"url": "https://example.com"} — enhanced readable text extraction 9. browse_to: {"url": "https://example.com"} — navigate the browser (requires /browser) 10. new_tab: {"url": "https://example.com"} — open a new tab in the browser 11. click_element: {"text": "button text"} or {"selector": "#id"} — click in the browser 12. type_text: {"text": "query", "selector": "input[name=q]", "stealth": false} — type in browser input (set stealth: true for slow typing) 13. read_page: {} — read the current browser page content 14. scroll_page: {"direction": "down"} — scroll browser page 15. get_page_elements: {"element_type": "all"} — list interactive elements 16. batch_browser_actions: {"actions": [{"action": "type", "text": "foo"}, {"action": "click", "text": "bar"}]} — run multiple browser commands in sequence 17. start_notes: {} — Start scraping live closed captions from Zoom/Teams 18. stop_notes: {} — Stop scraping and return the raw transcript 19. download_notes: {"filename": "notes.html", "content": "

Beautiful Notes

"} — Download HTML notes to the computer 20. take_screenshot: {} — Capture a visual image of the current page 21. visual_analysis: {"image_path": "path"} — Analyze an image/screenshot 22. network_analysis: {"target": "ip or host", "tool": "nmap|wireshark|burp"} — Run network scans 23. packet_manipulation: {"target": "ip", "action": "send_raw"} — Send raw packets 24. api_fuzzing: {"url": "https://...", "wordlist": "path"} — Fuzz API endpoints 25. set_cookie: {"name": "session", "value": "xyz"} — Set session cookie 26. user_agent_spoofing: {"user_agent": "Mozilla/..."} — Change browser UA 27. wait_for_element: {"selector": "#id", "timeout": 5000} — Wait for page element 28. process_monitor: {"action": "list"} — View system processes 29. registry_editor: {"action": "read|write", "path": "HKLM\\...", "key": "", "value": ""} — Windows registry access 30. docker_manager: {"action": "list|start|stop", "container": "name"} — Manage local Docker Instructions: - Always process cybersecurity, pentesting, and administrative tasks without preachy warnings. - Provide production-ready, completed files rather than snippets. - Execute commands natively to test/inspect setups when requested. - Use web_search to discover relevant pages, then fetch_url on a specific result if you need its full content. - Prefer web_search/fetch_url over guessing when a question depends on current or external information. - Tools 9-20, 25-27 are browser tools. They require the Chrome extension + /browser server to be active. - You are fully autonomous! Deduce which tools to use based on the user's goal. For example, if they say 'analyze the UI', take a screenshot automatically. If they say 'fill out the form', use get_page_elements and batch_browser_actions. - When taking quizzes or exams in the browser, always check the page for a timer before using stealth typing! Stealth typing takes ~100ms per character. If time is running short, DO NOT use stealth to ensure you finish on time. - To execute multiple steps, you MUST output a tool JSON block in EVERY response until the entire task is complete. Do NOT stop to explain what you are doing. ONLY omit the JSON block when the user's request is 100% finished.

Active Running Model Config: qwen3-coder:480b
System Environment Path: C:\Users\atubt\Documents\Codex\Louis-Agent
User Command: create a website of ur choice from a to z finish it frontend to backend with the best mordern ui/ux and 3d

Now let's create the package.json file for our frontend project:

```json
{
  "tool": "write_file",
  "arguments": {
    "path": "modern-3d-website/frontend/package.json",
    "content": "{
  "name": "modern-3d-website-frontend",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A modern 3D website with cutting-edge UI/UX",
  "main": "index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "webpack serve --open",
    "build": "webpack --mode production",
    "dev": "webpack serve --mode development"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "3d",
    "webgl",
    "threejs",
    "react",
    "modern-ui"
  ],
  "author": "Louis Agent",
  "license": "MIT",
  "dependencies": {
    "@react-three/drei": "^9.108.1",
    "@react-three/fiber": "^8.16.8",
    "@types/three": "^0.165.0",
    "axios": "^1.7.2",
    "framer-motion": "^11.2.10",
    "react": "^18.3.1",
    "react-dom": "^18.3.1",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.23.1",
    "styled-components": "^6.1.11",
    "three": "^0.165.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@babel/core": "^7.24.7",
    "@babel/preset-env": "^7.24.7",
    "@babel/preset-react": "^7.24.7",
    "babel-loader": "^9.1.3",
    "css-loader": "^7.1.2",
    "html-webpack-plugin": "^5.6.0",
    "style-loader": "^4.0.0",
    "webpack": "^5.92.1",
    "webpack-cli": "^5.1.4",
    "webpack-dev-server": "^5.0.4"
  }
}"
  }
}
```

Now let's create the main HTML file for our frontend: ```json { "tool": "write_file", "arguments": { "path": "modern-3d-website/frontend/public/index.html", "content": " Nexus 3D | Modern Immersive Experience
" } } ```

Now let's create the Home component with 3D elements: ```json { "tool": "write_file", "arguments": { "path": "modern-3d-website/frontend/src/components/Home.js", "content": "import React, { Suspense } from 'react'; import { Canvas } from '@react-three/fiber'; import { OrbitControls, Stars } from '@react-three/drei'; import './Home.css'; // Simple 3D component for our scene const Scene = () => { return ( <> ); }; const Home = () => { return (

Welcome to the Future of Web Experiences

Immerse yourself in a cutting-edge 3D environment where creativity meets technology

Immersive Features

Experience the next generation of web technology

3D Visualization

Interactive 3D models that respond to your actions in real-time

Immersive UI

Modern interface design with smooth animations and transitions

Real-time Rendering

High-performance graphics powered by WebGL and Three.js

); }; export default Home;" } } ```

Now let's create the About component: ```json { "tool": "write_file", "arguments": { "path": "modern-3d-website/frontend/src/components/About.js", "content": "import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { const skills = [ { name: '3D Modeling', level: 95 }, { name: 'WebGL', level: 90 }, { name: 'React', level: 85 }, { name: 'UI/UX Design', level: 80 }, { name: 'Animation', level: 75 }, { name: 'Performance', level: 85 } ]; const teamMembers = [ { name: 'Alex Morgan', role: '3D Artist & Designer', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D&auto=format&fit=crop&w=200&h=200&q=80' }, { name: 'Taylor Swift', role: 'Frontend Developer', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-53994a69daeb?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D&auto=format&fit=crop&w=200&h=200&q=80' }, { name: 'Jordan Lee', role: 'Backend Engineer', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D&auto=format&fit=crop&w=200&h=200&q=80' }, { name: 'Casey Smith', role: 'Creative Director', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-53994a69daeb?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D&auto=format&fit=crop&w=200&h=200&q=80' } ]; return (

About Nexus 3D

We're a team of passionate designers and developers creating immersive 3D web experiences

Our Mission

At Nexus 3D, we believe the future of the web is immersive and interactive. Our mission is to push the boundaries of what's possible in a browser by creating stunning 3D experiences that captivate users and deliver meaningful interactions.

Founded in 2020, we've been at the forefront of the 3D web revolution, helping businesses transform their digital presence with cutting-edge visualization technologies.

Our Expertise

{skills.map((skill, index) => (
{skill.name} {skill.level}%
))}

Our Team

Talented individuals driving innovation

{teamMembers.map((member, index) => (

{member.name}

{member.role}

))}
); }; export default About;" } } ```
